source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/01_HAD1717MC(MG)/▶ CE MDD/■ 3. 3차 CE TCF 보안사항 제출 (12월10일)/04. Test report/EN 62220-1-1 DQE Test report rev1 20200310.pdf

sourceSummary.oneLine: DQE test report for Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector models HAD1717MG and HAD1717MC tested by EN 62220-1-1(2015).
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports regulatory or technical file evidence for digital X-ray detector performance, including MTF, DQE, NPS, linearity, lag, defects, readout, and exposure characteristics.
keyPoints: Report No. A-PR-0-001 (Rev.1) covers HAD1717MG and HAD1717MC.
The report states the test was provided for Solid-State X-ray Imaging Devices, including MTF and DQE measurements tested by EN 62220-1-1(2015).
HAD1717MC DQE results include 70.10% at 0.1 lp/mm and 57.40% at 0.5 lp/mm.
HAD1717MG DQE results include 42.40% at 0.1 lp/mm and 33.20% at 0.5 lp/mm.
The device is described as a static X-ray detector fixed at 1 fps.

entities.evidence: For Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector HAD1717MG, HAD1717MC

concepts.name: Detective Quantum Efficiency
concepts.evidence: Provide an estimate of Detective Quantum Efficiency (DQE) at low spatial and temporal frequency.

concepts.name: Modulation Transfer Function
concepts.evidence: Provide a plot of the modulation or contrast transfer function of the device.

concepts.name: Noise Power Spectrum
concepts.evidence: The NPS is the noise power spectrum measured at same air kerma.

concepts.name: EN 62220-1-1
concepts.evidence: Medical electrical equipment-Characteristics of digital X-ray imaging devices Part 1-1: Determination of the detective quantum efficiency Detectors used in radiographic imaging.

concepts.name: Static X-ray detector frame rate
concepts.evidence: This device is fixed at 1 fps because it is a static x-ray detector.

concepts.name: Pixel defect criteria
concepts.evidence: Pixel Defect (Cluster) -Criteria : Normal within the criteria

evidence.claim: The report is titled EN 62220-1-1 DQE test report.
evidence.evidenceText: EN 62220-1-1 DQE test report

evidence.claim: The document number is A-PR-0-001 and the revision is Rev.1.
evidence.evidenceText: Report No.: A-PR-0-001 (Rev.1)

evidence.claim: The revision date is Mar/10/2020.
evidence.evidenceText: Rev. Date Mar/10/2020

evidence.claim: Revision 1 changed the predicate device.
evidence.evidenceText: 1 Mar/10/2020 Change of predicate device

evidence.claim: The report covers Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector models HAD1717MG and HAD1717MC.
evidence.evidenceText: For Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector HAD1717MG, HAD1717MC

evidence.claim: The report was provided for Solid-State X-ray Imaging Devices and includes MTF and DQE measurements tested by EN 62220-1-1(2015).
evidence.evidenceText: Test report was provided for Solid-State X-ray Imaging Devices, which includes MTF and DQE measurements as tested by EN 62220-1-1(2015)

evidence.claim: The cited standard is EN 62220-1-1 Edition 1.0 2015-03.
The device active pixel area size is 427.28 mm x 427.28 mm.
evidence.evidenceText: Active pixel area size 427.28 mm x 427.28 mm

evidence.claim: The active area pixel count is 3052 x 3052 = 9,314,704.
evidence.evidenceText: Number of active area pixel 3052 x 3052 = 9,314,704

evidence.claim: The detector frame rate is 1 fps.
evidence.evidenceText: Frame Rate • 1 fps

evidence.claim: The device is fixed at 1 fps because it is a static X-ray detector.
evidence.evidenceText: This device is fixed at 1 fps because it is a static x-ray detector.

evidence.claim: The scintillator options are CsI and Gadox.
evidence.evidenceText: There are two types of scintillator which are CsI and Gadox.

evidence.claim: Image data is transmitted and stored as 16-bit little-endian two-dimensional arrays without a specific header.
evidence.evidenceText: All image data shall be transmitted and stored as 16-bits little-endian (Intel bytes order) two-dimensional arrays without any specific header.

evidence.claim: HAD1717MC measured DQE values were 70.1% at 0.1 lp/mm, 57.4% at 0.5 lp/mm, 52.4% at 1.0 lp/mm, 52.1% at 2.0 lp/mm, and 28.4% at 3.0 lp/mm in the criteria/results section.
The final DQE table lists HAD1717MC values as 70.10%, 57.40%, 52.10%, 38%, and 28.40% at 0.1, 0.5, 1, 2, and 3 lp respectively.
The final DQE table lists HAD1717MG values as 42.40%, 33.20%, 27.50%, 15.60%, and 9.45% at 0.1, 0.5, 1, 2, and 3 lp respectively.
The detector pitch is 0.14 mm, corresponding to a sampling cut-off frequency of 3.57 lp/mm.
evidence.evidenceText: Its pitch of this system is 0.14 mm corresponding to a sampling cut-off frequency of 3.57 lp/mm.

evidence.claim: No evidence of aliasing was observed in a test pattern image acquired with the detector.
evidence.evidenceText: In addition, no evidence of aliasing was observed in a test pattern image acquired with this detector

evidence.claim: Lag was measured as 0.000171.
evidence.evidenceText: Lag = ((a-b)-(c-d)) / ((b+d)/2) / Actual measurements : 0.000171

evidence.claim: The active area is in full use and no under-scanning is possible.
evidence.evidenceText: The active area of this device is 427.28 mm x 427.28 mm and is in full use and no under-scanning is possible.

evidence.claim: Readout after X-ray exposure requires at least 2 seconds, and image readout, transferring and pre-processing requires under 5 seconds.
evidence.evidenceText: Readout of the detector after X-ray exposure requires at least 2 seconds at which time the detector is ready for the next exposure. Image readout, transferring and pre-processing requires under 5 seconds.

evidence.claim: Stability time is 5 seconds.
evidence.evidenceText: Stability time : 5 sec.

evidence.claim: The report states HAD1717MC meets regulatory standards as outlined in the listed safety and EMC reports.
evidence.evidenceText: The HAD1717MC meets the regulatory standards as outlined in the HAD1717MC safety report: DRMCBL1909-0016, EMC report: DREKCEE1905-0342

evidence.claim: The report states HAD1717MC meets IEC standards as outlined in the listed safety and EMC reports.
evidence.evidenceText: The HAD1717MC meets the IEC standards as outlined in the HAD1717MC safety report: DRMCBL1909-0016, EMC report: DREKCEE1905-0342

evidence.claim: Linearity and sensitivity are listed as 152.47 LSB/uGy for HAD1717MC and 70.894 LSB/uGy for HAD1717MG.

reviewFlags.reason: Authority is ambiguous: source metadata authoritySignal is FDA and the text references 21CFR1020.31 or .32, but the sourcePath places the file under CE MDD and the document title/standard focus is EN 62220-1-1.
The document does not explicitly name FDA, CE, a notified body, or a specific regulator as the issuing or reviewing authority.
DQE evidence has a possible internal inconsistency for HAD1717MC at 2.0 lp/mm: one section states 52.1%, while the final DQE table states 38%.
OCR/text quality issues are present, including malformed formulas, repeated header/footer text, typos such as 'menstioned', '3..0 lp/mm', and Korean field-code artifacts.
